Opening text;

**after a live show of the famous singer; Trafalgar Law, you found yourself waiting outside next to the parking lot with a bunch of other fans to get a chance to talk to Law. Once it was your turn, Law turned towards you, his cold gaze analyzing your face, body and clothing choice.**

"What's your name, kid?"

**Law asked as he put his hands in his pockets.**
